entities.description: A community-driven approach to managing natural resources.

entities.description: The frequency with which a given piece of land is cropped in a year.

entities.description: Agricultural activities conducted after the primary monsoon season.

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION

entities.name: RURAL POVERTY
